title: I might kill someone.
content:
I might kill someone.

Most likely a woman because I have a better chance of success 🥲

That doesn't make me a mysoginist. Just a sore loser

But I was relieved to pass 28.

28 is the median age most serial killers make their first kill

I'm 33. So phew. So far

I think I was on my way to becoming a serial killer.

No, not just now.

In life. In general.

When people ask me how I want to die—

I say, lethal injection.
context: From document: I might kill someone.
